title: Relating to Renewable Energy
sponsors: Solomon; Ige; Kahele; Kidani; Kim; Slom
siting_change: Solar as permitted use on ag land
introduced_vs_final_delta: Introduced: no cap, all soil classes, non-ag-primary OK. SD1 (Senate ENE/AGL/WLH): B/C/D/E only + 10% of parcel on B/C + IAL ban. HD1 (House EEP/WLO): + 20-acre lesser-of ceiling (sized to 5MW competitive-bid waiver) + IAL appurtenance exception. CD1: IAL refs deleted; 10%/20ac lesser-of enacted; class A ban via 205-4.5(a)(19).

title: Relating to Renewable Energy
siting_change: Class A ag land: solar permitted-use exception via 205-4.5(a)(20) only if on pre-2014 paved/unpaved road, parcel has county ag tax dedication or ag conservation easement, road stays passable, and LUC special use permit granted; sunset 2019-06-30 with reenactment of prior 205-4.5; permitted facilities grandfathered for operable life then 12-month decommissioning
introduced_vs_final_delta: Introduced: 5%/5-acre class-A allowance in 205-2(d)(7) plus no-material-interference test in 205-4.5(a)(20). SD1 (AGL/ENE): deleted 205-2 section; class-A exception narrowed to existing-road siting only (HARC's draft language). HD1 (AGR): added tax-dedication/easement condition (HDOA ask), SUP condition (LUC ask), sunset 6/30/2019 + grandfathering/decommissioning. EEP/WAL passed unamended. Did NOT create the general B/C-soils SUP path (that is Act 55/SB2658)

title: Relating to Solar Energy
siting_change: Created the SUP path: added 'unless a special use permit is granted pursuant to section 205-6' to 205-2(d)(6)(B); added 'or for which a special use permit is granted' to 205-4.5(a)(20); created new 205-4.5(a)(21) allowing unlimited-acreage B/C solar via SUP conditioned on compatible-ag lease at >=50% below fair market rent, proof of financial security for decommissioning, owner-expense decommissioning within 12 months + restoration of disturbed earth; class A ban retained; geothermal renumbered (21)->(22); no sunset
introduced_vs_final_delta: Introduced: raise 10% cap to 30%, delete 20-acre lesser-of cap, adjacent-parcel joint development, no SUP, no rent condition. SD1 (ENE/AGL): +50%-below-FMR lease on excess area (after First Wind Solar Group request). SD2 (WTL): reverted to 10%/20ac, inserted SUP clause (LUC recommendation), sunset 7/1/2020. SD3 (Floor Am 7): 30% cap again. HD1 (AGR): 10%/20ac-or-SUP architecture, deleted adjacent-parcel language and sunset (tracks First Wind's attached draft). HD2 (EEP/WAL): created (a)(21), added financial security + earth restoration modeled on wind decommissioning law (committees' own addition)
committees: S: ENE/AGL, WTL, Floor Am 7; H: AGR, EEP/WAL (jt)
status: Enacted: Act 55, signed 4/30/2014 (Gov Msg 1155); Senate final 23-1 (L. Thielen no)
